generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for lighting fixtures configured with user-centered control strategies (e.g., adaptive dimming, color tuning, occupancy-based activation) via TwinLight's BIM-centric control framework."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for HVAC systems integrated with BIM model metadata for real-time command execution from the Digital Twin."
]

instance WindowBlindActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for automated window blinds with dynamic control policies embedded in the BIM model for energy optimization."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component executing BOREALIS reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control strategies with real-time sensor feedback."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor detecting occupancy status in building spaces, modeled within BIM with metadata for integration via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting real-time environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity, light levels) for building performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring real-time energy consumption across building systems, integrated with BIM metadata for semantic alignment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized sensor in BOREALIS project capturing post-occupancy data for iterative reinforcement learning model refinement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring structural health metrics (e.g., vibration, stress) for predictive maintenance applications."
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralHealthDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance StructuralHealthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralHealthSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data with embedded runtime metadata (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations, control logic)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance DittoDigitalTwinInstance : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital twin instance storing real-time states (e.g., sensor readings, actuator commands) in structured JSON format."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance HonoDeviceConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono configurations defining device endpoints, authentication, and data ingestion pipelines for sensor-to-DT communication."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance TwinLightControlFramework : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "TwinLight's BIM-centric control configuration framework embedding domain-specific control semantics (e.g., lighting strategies) for automated runtime policy generation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearningModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning model in BOREALIS using historical sensor data to optimize control strategies iteratively for energy and comfort."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data collected from building spaces for performance analytics and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental conditions data (e.g., temperature, humidity) used for building performance monitoring and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time energy consumption data across building systems for lifecycle cost optimization and regulatory compliance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data used to iteratively refine reinforcement learning models in BOREALIS for adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance StructuralHealthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structural health metrics data for predictive maintenance applications and building safety monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralHealthDataTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven Engineering pipeline automating model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for generating runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto instances, Hono configurations)."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedCommissioningService, SimulationOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto providing digital twin instances with bidirectional communication capabilities and dynamic configuration for runtime updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, RealTimeSynchronizationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems via standardized protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSynchronizationService, DataIngestionPipelineService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 providing immersive 3D visualization for interactive building performance monitoring and stakeholder dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework in BOREALIS enabling adaptive control strategies optimization based on real-time and historical sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlPolicyUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building performance metrics (e.g., energy consumption, occupancy) via Unreal Engine 5 for immersive 3D monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight, OccupancyHeatmapInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization of energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects using post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TwinLight's BIM-centric control configuration framework automating setup and calibration of BCS devices to reduce manual effort."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceCalibrationAction, ControlConfigurationAction
]

instance SimulationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "What-if scenario analysis and lifecycle cost optimization leveraging BIM's semantic richness for energy-saving strategies testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingStrategyInsight, CostOptimizationInsight
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points allowing DT Engineers to develop and deploy domain-specific plugins (e.g., predictive maintenance)."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems with continuous synchronization enabled by Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemAlignmentInsight
]

instance DataIngestionPipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Middleware service managing device endpoints, authentication, and data ingestion pipelines for sensor-to-DT communication."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated suggestions for adjusting control logic based on occupancy trends and performance analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdateAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance service identifying failing sensors/actuators and recommending maintenance actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time recommendations for energy-saving strategies and occupant comfort adjustments based on current building performance metrics."
]

instance OccupancyHeatmapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical trend analysis of occupancy patterns informing design decisions like retrofitting strategies."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized energy consumption strategies derived from reinforcement learning analysis of sensor data."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for visual comfort adjustments (e.g., adaptive lighting, circadian lighting) based on occupancy and environmental data."
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects (e.g., circadian lighting impacts) to inform control policy adjustments."
]

instance EnergySavingStrategyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "What-if analysis results for testing different energy-saving strategies before implementation."
]

instance CostOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lifecycle cost optimization recommendations based on simulation results and historical performance data."
]

instance DeviceCalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated calibration of BCS devices during commissioning phase."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime control policies from BIM-embedded control semantics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of failing sensors/actuators with predicted failure timelines and maintenance recommendations."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies in building operations requiring immediate attention."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of maintenance work orders based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComplianceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated reports for energy efficiency standards compliance (e.g., LEED certification) with semantic data validation."
]

instance FacilityManagerInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights presented through Unreal Engine 5 visualizations for facility management decision-making."
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to control logic based on performance analytics and occupancy trends."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemAlignmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric representing alignment between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of data ingestion pipelines and device communication status for operational reliability."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves the transmission of **control signals and commands** from the DT back to the Building Control System (BCS) to adjust physical components (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC). This is achieved through **runtime configuration management**, allowing the DT to dynamically update control policies without requiring full redeployment. In the **BOREALIS** project, the DT iteratively refines control policies using reinforcement learning, feeding optimized commands back to the physical system. The framework ensures seamless integration of these control signals via middleware (Eclipse Hono and Ditto), enabling real-time operational adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale**, ensuring continuous synchronization between the physical building and its digital twin. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling immediate updates and responses to changes in the physical system. While specific latency metrics (e.g., millisecond-level) are not explicitly detailed, the emphasis on real-time monitoring and bidirectional communication implies sub-second synchronization for critical operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing **static and runtime data** (e.g., building geometry, sensor/actuator metadata).
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** handle **real-time data ingestion, processing, and command execution**, acting as the **bidirectional bridge** between the physical and virtual worlds.
  3. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** renders the **interactive 3D DT**, enabling **facility managers** to monitor and control the building.
  4. **Service Layer**: **Custom DT services** (e.g., RL optimization, predictive maintenance) are deployed as **microservices**, integrated via **standardized extension points**.
  5. **Deployment Pipeline**: **Model-driven transformations** automate the **generation of runtime artifacts** (e.g., Ditto configurations, Hono endpoints) from the **enriched BIM model**.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across **multiple buildings** and **heterogeneous IoT ecosystems**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **entire building life cycle**, from **initial design** (using BIM as the static model backbone) through **construction**, **operation**, and **refurbishment/adaptation**. During the **design phase**, BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor and actuator configurations) to enable DT deployment. In the **operation phase**, the DT integrates real-time data from sensors and BCS to support monitoring, optimization, and control. The framework also accommodates **refurbishment and adaptations**, ensuring the DT remains aligned with evolving physical systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** (as referenced in related work) by ensuring continuous synchronization and automated updates. Validation mechanisms include **model validation** (e.g., checking BIM metadata consistency) and **runtime monitoring** to detect discrepancies between the virtual and physical systems. The ODTE metric provides a measurable indicator of the DT's accuracy and reliability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **standardized integration mechanisms** and **standard compliance** for interoperability, though specific standards (e.g., IFC, bSDD) are not explicitly listed. The use of **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** ensures alignment with open-source middleware standards, while the model-driven pipeline leverages **BIM as a semantic backbone** for consistency across AECO workflows. The architecture supports **modular service integration**, enabling adherence to evolving industry standards."
]
